title: get_health_status
description: Verify that GET /health returns 200 with status, version, and timestamp when the API is healthy.

title: get_deals_kanban_list
description: Verify that GET /deals/kanban returns 200 with an object mapping columns to deal lists on successful retrieval.

title: post_create_new_deal
description: Verify that POST /deals with valid municipi_id, estat, pla_tipus, and preu_acordat creates a new deal and returns 200 with the created deal object.

title: get_deal_full_360_view
description: Verify that GET /deals/{deal_id}/full returns 200 with the aggregated 360 view object including deal details, municipi, contactes, and interaccions for an existing deal.

title: get_contactes_list
description: Verify that GET /contactes returns 200 with an array of contacts on successful retrieval.

title: post_create_new_contacte
description: Verify that POST /contactes with valid municipi_id, name, role, and email creates a new contact and returns 200 with the created contact object.

title: get_municipis_list
description: Verify that GET /municipis returns 200 with a list of municipalities on successful retrieval.

title: get_calendar_events
description: Verify that GET /calendar/events with valid start and end query parameters returns 200 with events array formatted for react-big-calendar.

title: post_create_new_interaccio
description: Verify that POST /interaccions with valid deal_id, type, content, and timestamp creates a new interaction and returns 200 with the created interaction object.

title: post_ask_ai_agent_about_deal
description: Verify that POST /agent/deals/{deal_id}/ask with a valid question returns 200 with the AI agent response object containing summary, key facts, and suggestions.
